title: blechnum puberulum
intro: Blechnum puberulum, also known as the hairy chain fern, is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Blechnum puberulum include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. Blechnum puberulum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or dried powder for consumption, and is also sometimes used in topical applications.
